## Summary

## Type

<!-- Check whichever applies. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Breaking change (anything that changes existing keyboard/data shape/CLI behavior)

## Testing

<!-- What did you do to verify the change? At minimum, run `bunx tsc --noEmit` and `bun run dev`. -->

- [ ] `bunx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `bun run dev` smoke-tested on the affected tab(s)
- [ ] Tested with at least one ticker (mention which)
